form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (27.39) at Bulli in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 11 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from five starts. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Found trouble in the run here last time and failed to finish before going for a four-and-a-half months spell. Suited here and worth another try fresh.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (23.07) over 400m at Bulli. Drawn close to the inside. Will need plenty of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (23.07) over 400m at Bulli. Drawn close to the inside. Will need plenty of luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (30.35) at Wentworth Park over 520m. Can feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (30.35) at Wentworth Park over 520m. Can feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered on the home turn and lost momentum.
Passing the catching pen came together.
Looked outwardly in the home straight on the approach to the finish.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on March 27 over 440m at this track behind How High beaten 4.5 lengths (25.42). Others have better credentials.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on March 27 over 440m at this track behind How High beaten 4.5 lengths (25.42). Others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 440m at this track in a handy (25.35), beating Cha Cha Ethics. Will find this a bit tougher, prepared to risk.

formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 440m at this track in a handy (25.35), beating Cha Cha Ethics. Will find this a bit tougher, prepared to risk.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Took an awkward stride in the first turn and shifted out, losing momentum.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (20.58) when sixth over 350m at this track in a Grade 5. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (25.49) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 10 lengths. Yet to score but has placed each of two runs from this draw. Among the chances on best.
